claim_boundary: Fixture-level proof of restartable failure localization and teaching capture; not a formal-proof benchmark win, hosted result, novelty proof, or private-root equivalence claim.

cross_links.next_refinement: Carry grammar replay bridge rows into demo pattern routes without making the demo storyboard an authority surface.

route.cold_agent_instruction: Open the bridge cases, recompute the source_clip_hash for one grammar failure, then verify its repair_route points back to the grammar worker action.

executable_grammar_replay_bridge.selected_native_pattern: executable grammar failure becomes replayable teaching

anti_claims: candidate rule is private Lab/Evolve authority
candidate rule is benchmark performance evidence
candidate rule grants public release permission
global_rule_candidates.rule: If a validated operation IR repeatedly produces evaluator answer mismatches, freeze upstream normalization, mutate the solver node first, rerun the evaluator, and only escalate upstream after solver variants fail.

nodes.contract: Accept a public-safe synthetic task in native prose.
Extract operation intent and operands into a small JSON IR.
Produce an answer from the operation IR.
Compare the answer with the fixture expectation.
Localize the first bad node without blaming the whole graph.
Restart from the nearest safe point instead of replaying the full graph.
Try bounded public-safe variants from the restart point.
Convert the local repair into a reusable graph-design teaching.

graph.restart_policy: Restart from the nearest artifact whose producing node passed validation; do not mutate upstream nodes without evidence.

improvement_delta: The release specimen makes failure localization, restart-point choice, replay variants, winner selection, and teaching capture visible in one deterministic fixture.
public_safety_boundary: Synthetic public-safe arithmetic fixtures only; no private Lab/Evolve engine, provider output, benchmark trace, private root path, or hidden corpus is included.
publication_boundary: No website card or public release may outrun registry records, receipt refs, fail-closed publication gate, and fresh clean-run or clone probes.

anti_claims: local source capsules only
not private system provenance
not benchmark proof
not public release approval

carryforward_contract.rule: Every reusable teaching must carry its replay source clip, deterministic hash, restart point, replay result, and anti-claim boundary.

anti_claims: source capsule is not private Lab/Evolve trace authority
source capsule is not benchmark evidence
source capsule is not public release approval
source_capsules.authority_boundary: A capsule hash proves deterministic fixture carryforward only; it is not private lab authority, benchmark proof, or publication permission.
source_capsules.omission_boundary: Capsule contains only the public-safe fixture clip required to replay the teaching; no private Lab/Evolve trace, provider transcript, benchmark row, or hidden corpus is included.

semantic_carryforward.carryforward_rule: Preserve the validated source clip, restart point, replay evidence, and teaching ref together; do not promote a teaching when its source clip or hash is missing.
